summary: Iteration 63 - Locale-scoped item rendering + LocalizedField in 5 managers. All 28 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: LocalizedField working in all 5 managers (Testimonials, About, Services, Blog, Books), locale filtering working correctly (ES-only items hidden in EN mode, visible in ES mode).
critical_code_review_comments: i18n.js: itemHasLocale() helper correctly returns true for plain strings (legacy) and dict values with non-empty content for the requested locale
AurexSections.js: All 14 itemized sections now filter items by locale using itemHasLocale()
AurexTestimonialsMono: Filters by t.content field, resets page index when language changes
AurexAboutMono: Hides entire section when data.title has no translation for current locale
AurexReadingMono: Wraps b.title and b.author with tt() for proper localization
TestimonialsManager: LocalizedField wiring for name, title, content fields
AboutManager: LocalizedField wiring for 7 fields (label, title, description, signature_name, signature_title, button_text)
ServicesManager: LocalizedField wiring for title, short_description, full_content
BlogManager: LocalizedField wiring for title, summary, content
BooksManager: LocalizedField wiring for 6 fields (title, author, description, synopsis, who_is_it_for, about_author)
admin_content.py: Added get_slug_text() helper to extract string from localized dict values for slugify()
seed_data_creation: Created ES-only testimonial via API to test locale filtering, then cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 63 verified locale-scoped item rendering and LocalizedField in 5 managers. Key findings: (1) itemHasLocale() correctly filters items by locale - ES-only items hidden in EN mode, visible in ES mode; (2) Legacy plain-string content remains visible in all locales (backwards compatibility); (3) All 5 managers (Testimonials, About, Services, Blog, Books) have LocalizedField with EN/ES tabs; (4) Fixed backend bug where slugify() failed on dict values - added get_slug_text() helper.

backend: POST /api/admin/testimonials accepts and persists dict values for name, title, content
POST /api/admin/services accepts and persists dict values for title, short_description, full_content
POST /api/admin/blog accepts and persists dict values for title, summary, content (fixed slugify bug)
POST /api/admin/books accepts and persists dict values for title, author, description, synopsis, who_is_it_for, about_author
PUT /api/admin/about accepts and persists dict values for label, title, description, signature_name, signature_title, button_text
GET /api/admin/* endpoints return dict values correctly
All 7 Aurex section public endpoints return 200 with items
frontend: TestimonialsManager: LocalizedField shows EN/ES tabs for name, title, content fields
AboutManager: LocalizedField shows EN/ES tabs for 7 fields with green dot indicators
ServicesManager: LocalizedField shows EN/ES tabs for title, short_description, full_content
BlogManager: LocalizedField shows EN/ES tabs for title, summary, content
BooksManager: LocalizedField shows EN/ES tabs for 6 fields
Language switcher visible with EN/ES options
ES-only testimonial NOT visible in EN mode (correct locale filtering)
ES-only testimonial IS visible in ES mode on carousel page 2
Testimonials carousel page index resets when language changes

bugs_fixed.issue: Blog post creation fails with 500 error when title is a localized dict
bugs_fixed.root_cause: slugify() function in admin_content.py received dict instead of string
bugs_fixed.fix: Added get_slug_text() helper to extract string from localized dict values before slugifying
